documents: Fund Name: HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth. Category: Large Cap. Type: Direct Growth. Risk Level: Moderately High. Fund Managers: Rahul Baijal, Dhruv Muchhal. Benchmark: Nifty 100 TRI. This fund invests predominantly in large-cap companies (top 100 by market cap).

HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth metrics: Expense Ratio: 0.98%. Exit Load: 1% if redeemed within 1 year, Nil after 1 year. Minimum SIP: Rs 100. Minimum Lump Sum: Rs 100. Current NAV: Rs 1,193.44 (as of 27 May 2026). Riskometer: Moderately High. AUM: Rs 38,121 crore.
HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth performance: 1 Year Return: -2.65%. 3 Year Return (CAGR): 12.41%. 5 Year Return (CAGR): 13.08%. Benchmark: Nifty 100 TRI.

Fund Name: HDFC Equity Fund Direct Growth. Category: Multi Cap. Type: Direct Growth. Risk Level: Very High. Fund Managers: Roshi Jain, Dhruv Muchhal. Benchmark: NIFTY 500 TRI. This fund invests across market capitalizations with no restriction on market cap allocation.

HDFC Equity Fund Direct Growth metrics: Expense Ratio: 0.79%. Exit Load: 1% if redeemed within 1 year, Nil after 1 year. Minimum SIP: Rs 100. Minimum Lump Sum: Rs 100. Current NAV: Rs 1,906.75 (as of 27 May 2026). Riskometer: Very High. AUM: Rs 65,000 crore approximately.
HDFC Equity Fund Direct Growth performance: 1 Year Return: approximately -2%. 3 Year Return (CAGR): approximately 17%. 5 Year Return (CAGR): approximately 18%. Benchmark: NIFTY 500 TRI.

Fund Name: HDFC Focused Fund Direct Growth. Category: Focused Fund. Type: Direct Growth. Risk Level: Very High. Fund Managers: Roshi Jain, Dhruv Muchhal. Benchmark: NIFTY 500 TRI. This fund holds a concentrated portfolio of up to 30 stocks across market caps.

HDFC Focused Fund Direct Growth metrics: Expense Ratio: 0.68%. Exit Load: 1% if redeemed within 1 year, Nil after 1 year. Minimum SIP: Rs 100. Minimum Lump Sum: Rs 100. Current NAV: Rs 255.36 (as of 27 May 2026). Riskometer: Very High. AUM: Rs 26,182 crore.
HDFC Focused Fund Direct Growth performance: 1 Year Return: -0.86%. 3 Year Return (CAGR): 18.50%. 5 Year Return (CAGR): 20.09%. Benchmark: NIFTY 500 TRI.

Fund Name: HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Plan Growth. Category: ELSS (Equity Linked Savings Scheme). Type: Direct Growth. Risk Level: Very High. Fund Managers: Amar Kalkundrikar, Dhruv Muchhal. Benchmark: NIFTY 500 TRI. This fund qualifies for tax deduction under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act up to Rs 1.5 lakh per year. It has a mandatory lock-in period of 3 years from the date of investment.

HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Plan Growth metrics: Expense Ratio: 1.11%. Exit Load: Nil (mandatory lock-in of 3 years applies from date of investment). Minimum SIP: Rs 500. Minimum Lump Sum: Rs 500. Current NAV: Rs 1,433.27 (as of 29 May 2026). Riskometer: Very High. AUM: Rs 15,560 crore. Lock-in Period: 3 years. Tax benefit: Up to Rs 1.5 lakh deduction under Section 80C.
HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Fund Direct Plan Growth performance: 1 Year Return: -3.32%. 3 Year Return (CAGR): 17.26%. 5 Year Return (CAGR): approximately 16%. Benchmark: NIFTY 500 TRI.

Fund Name: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth. Category: Mid Cap. Type: Direct Growth. Risk Level: Very High. Fund Manager: Chirag Setalvad. Benchmark: Nifty Midcap 150 TRI. This fund invests primarily in mid-cap companies, defined as companies ranked 101-250 by market capitalization.

HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth metrics: Expense Ratio: 0.79%. Exit Load: 1% if redeemed within 1 year, Nil after 1 year. Minimum SIP: Rs 100. Minimum Lump Sum: Rs 100. Current NAV: Rs 220.64 (as of 27 Apr 2026). Riskometer: Very High. AUM: Rs 85,358 crore.
HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth performance: 3 Year Return (CAGR): 25.46%. 5 Year Return (CAGR): approximately 24%. Benchmark: Nifty Midcap 150 TRI.
